# UC-20.3.1 · SaaS License Utilization (Assigned vs Active)

## Description

Paying for assigned-but-unused seats wastes budget; comparing entitlements to real sign-in or activity highlights reclaim and right-size opportunities before renewals.

## Value

Paying for assigned-but-unused seats wastes budget; comparing entitlements to real sign-in or activity highlights reclaim and right-size opportunities before renewals.

## Implementation

Ingest monthly license assignment exports and last-sign-in or 30-day active user counts from IdP or vendor admin APIs. Schedule weekly jobs; join on `sku`/`product`. Alert when utilization drops below policy thresholds. Feed reclamation workflows with user lists.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Install and configure the required add-on or app: Microsoft Entra ID Add-on, Okta Splunk App, Salesforce TA.
• Ensure the following data sources are available: `sourcetype=license:usage`, `sourcetype=o365:reporting`.
• For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Ingest monthly license assignment exports and last-sign-in or 30-day active user counts from IdP or vendor admin APIs. Schedule weekly jobs; join on `sku`/`product`. Alert when utilization drops below policy thresholds. Feed reclamation workflows with user lists.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=saas sourcetype="license:usage"
| eval assigned=coalesce(licenses_assigned,0), active=coalesce(active_users_30d,0)
| eval utilization_pct=round(100*active/nullif(assigned,0),1)
| where utilization_pct < 70 OR active < assigned*0.5
| stats latest(assigned) as assigned latest(active) as active latest(utilization_pct) as util_pct by product, sku, cost_center
| sort util_pct
```

Understanding this SPL

**SaaS License Utilization (Assigned vs Active)** — Paying for assigned-but-unused seats wastes budget; comparing entitlements to real sign-in or activity highlights reclaim and right-size opportunities before renewals.

Documented **Data sources**: `sourcetype=license:usage`, `sourcetype=o365:reporting`. **App/TA** (typical add-on context): Microsoft Entra ID Add-on, Okta Splunk App, Salesforce TA. The SPL below should target the same indexes and sourcetypes you configured for that feed—rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` if your deployment differs.

The first pipeline stage scopes events using **index**: saas; **sourcetype**: license:usage. That sourcetype matches what this use case lists under Data sources.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

• Scopes the data: index=saas, sourcetype="license:usage". Cross-check against **Data sources** above so indexes and sourcetypes match your ingestion.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **assigned** — often to normalize units, derive a ratio, or prepare for thresholds.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **utilization_pct** — often to normalize units, derive a ratio, or prepare for thresholds.
• Filters the current rows with `where utilization_pct < 70 OR active < assigned*0.5` — typically the threshold or rule expression for this monitoring goal.
• `stats` rolls up events into metrics; results are split **by product, sku, cost_center** so each row reflects one combination of those dimensions.
• Orders rows with `sort` — combine with `head`/`tail` for top-N patterns.


Step 3 — Validate
compare with the cloud billing console for the same scope, accounts, and time range.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add the search to a dashboard or set up alert actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, etc.) as required. Document the use case in your runbook and assign an owner. Consider visualizations: Bar chart (utilization % by product), Table (reclaim candidates), Single value (wasted seat estimate).

## SPL

```spl
index=saas sourcetype="license:usage"
| eval assigned=coalesce(licenses_assigned,0), active=coalesce(active_users_30d,0)
| eval utilization_pct=round(100*active/nullif(assigned,0),1)
| where utilization_pct < 70 OR active < assigned*0.5
| stats latest(assigned) as assigned latest(active) as active latest(utilization_pct) as util_pct by product, sku, cost_center
| sort util_pct
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (utilization % by product), Table (reclaim candidates), Single value (wasted seat estimate).
